refnamediv.refpurpose: displays the absolute maximum value of model equations if it is above a threshold

listitem.para: * dbmat= a tsmat, representing the database associated to the model
* boun = a [2 x 1] string vector, the bound over which to perform the calcualtions
* tol = a scalar, the tolerance criterion
* nothing : results are displayed on screen

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION For a model and an associated database calculates the rhs minus the lhs of each equation and displays the absolute maximum value if it is above a threshold.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
